infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We use the camera so you can scan and catalogue your wardrobe.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We access your photos so you can add existing pictures of your clothes.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use your location to show accurate local weather for outfit suggestions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: We use the microphone so you can talk to your AI stylist in the Magic Mirror.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow AtelIA to use the camera to scan your clothes.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow AtelIA to access your photos to add clothes.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: We use your location to show accurate local weather for outfit suggestions.

plugins.microphonePermission: We use the microphone so you can talk to your AI stylist in the Magic Mirror.
